entries.openingLines: April is the cruellest month, breeding lilacs out of the dead land...
entries.title: The Waste Land
entries.author: T.S. Eliot

entries.openingLines: I saw the best minds of my generation destroyed by madness, starving hysterical naked...
entries.title: Howl
entries.author: Allen Ginsberg

entries.openingLines: Two roads diverged in a yellow wood, and sorry I could not travel both...
entries.title: The Road Not Taken
entries.author: Robert Frost
